verdict.core_answer: The project now has strong structure theory, strong constraint theory, strong initialization support, strong admissible convergence support, strong online survival stability, and strong rollback-recovery correctness. Training can now be treated as a strongly constrained constructive solve rather than blind search, although full unique closed-form theta* generation remains a stronger future theorem.
verdict.remaining_gap: full unique closed-form theta* generation, not constructive constrained training
